behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the file path packages/solid-router/src/useRouterState.tsx, the function deepEqual, and expected behaviors matching the tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: instruction describes the bug and expected behavior but does not prescribe the exact code change (e.g., no 'add isPromiseLike check').

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: The node-based tests check for the literal string 'isPromiseLike(a) || isPromiseLike(b)' in the source via src.includes(...); an alternative correct fix using different variable names or inline check would fail these tests even if behavior is correct.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute node subprocesses and also run the real unit test/build suites, not just text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: The node tests reconstruct deepEqual in JS and gate behavior on src.includes('isPromiseLike(a) || isPromiseLike(b)'); if that string is absent the reconstructed function still runs and would fail on different-promise case, but crucially the tests never actually call the real deepEqual from the source — they only check for the literal string presence to decide behavior, so passing is contingent on that exact string.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All behaviors in instruction (different promises, same ref, nested, thenable, promise vs object) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are separate named functions with docstrings indicating F2P/P2P.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: File is named but localization is part of the task context; no specific line numbers or code are given.
